# buyacarafterbankruptcy.com

> Complete guide to buying a car after bankruptcy -- auto loans, interest rates, credit unions, dealer tips, and timing.

buyacarafterbankruptcy.com is a free, open-source educational resource about purchasing a vehicle after filing bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/: Overview of buying a car after bankruptcy -- options, timing, and what to expect
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/auto-loan-options.html: Auto loan options available after bankruptcy discharge
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/interest-rates.html: What interest rates to expect on post-bankruptcy auto loans
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/credit-union-loans.html: Credit union auto loans after bankruptcy -- advantages and how to qualify
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/how-soon.html: How soon after discharge you can buy a car
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/cosigner.html: Using a cosigner for an auto loan after bankruptcy
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/used-vs-new.html: Used vs new car after bankruptcy -- which makes more sense
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/dealer-tips.html: Tips for negotiating at a dealership after bankruptcy
- https://buyacarafterbankruptcy.com/faq.html: Frequently asked questions about buying a car after bankruptcy

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
